action_set_definitions.name: get_vertical_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves water temperature and dissolved oxygen (DO) levels at specific depths to identify stratification and oxygen deficits.

depths.description: A list of depths (in meters) at which to take measurements.

action_set_definitions.name: get_water_chemistry
action_set_definitions.description: Measures pH and ammonia concentration at a specific depth, essential for monitoring toxic metabolite levels in the hypolimnion.

depth.description: The depth in meters to sample the water chemistry.

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current basin metadata, equipment statuses, and last feeding time.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_mixing_and_aeration
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the aeration system mode and mechanical mixing intensity to homogenize the basin.

aerator_mode.description: Target status of the oxygenation system.

mixing_intensity.description: Mechanical mixing power as a percentage (0-100%).

action_set_definitions.name: manage_feeding
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the feeding regime to manage Biological Oxygen Demand (BOD) based on the identified risk level.

state_description.water_temperature: The current temperature of the water in degrees Celsius.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen: Concentration of dissolved oxygen in mg/L.
state_description.ph_level: The potential of Hydrogen (0-14 scale) of the water.
state_description.ammonia_concentration: Total ammonia nitrogen levels in parts per million (ppm).
state_description.water_level: The current height of the water in the tank in meters.
state_description.aerator_status: Current status of the oxygenation system (off, low, medium, high).
state_description.heater_status: Whether the water heating element is currently active.
state_description.last_feeding_time: Timestamp or relative time of the last feeding action.
